goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range and should serve 'european' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 0' and should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should serve european food
The restaurant should be in the centre
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should have a star of 0 and should be in the same area as the restaurant
Make sure you get hotel type and postcode
